author: y4rr
content:
Phase 9 (with continuation) complete. APPROVE.

Outcome: 12 PASS-able vision models -> 13 PASS-able. Target hit.

DeepLabV3-ResNet50 value-parity PASSES at max_abs_err=8.941e-6 (3 orders of magnitude under 1e-3 tolerance).

Phase 9 (initial dispatch) landed:
- aspp.rs: Aspp::new gains atrous_rates parameter (default to torchvision (12,24,36) for deeplabv3, surface for legacy (6,12,18))
- deeplabv3.rs: DeepLabV3Head rewritten as 5-element Sequential matching torchvision DeepLabHead (ASPP -> Conv2d 3x3 bias=false -> BN -> ReLU -> Conv2d 1x1 bias=true)
- conformance_vision_models.rs: remap_torchvision_to_ferrotorch_deeplabv3_keys + apply_probe_buffer_remap helpers
- probe_deeplabv3_remap.rs (NEW): 3 active probes + 1 diagnostic confirming remap covers every torchvision classifier param + BN buffer 1:1
- regenerate_vision_fixtures.py: deeplabv3_resnet50 fixture builder

Phase 9 STOP-AND-REPORT triggered: ResNet50Dilated::new used uniform dilation across blocks; torchvision threads previous_dilation per-block (layer3=[1,2,2,2,2,2], layer4=[2,4,4]). 6th divergence beyond pre-flight's 5-item list. Filed #1011.

Phase 9b continuation closed #1011 by Option (a) — replaced ResNet50Dilated::new's hand-rolled make_dilated_layer with delegation to resnet::resnet50_dilated([false, true, true]) (the same factory FCN-ResNet50 uses, which already PASSes via correct previous_dilation threading). Unifies the dilated-backbone codepath. The bn2 ↔ conv2.bn test-side rewrite in state_remap is no longer needed.

Verification (architect):
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- deeplabv3_resnet50_value_parity: ok (max_abs=8.941e-6, max_rel=1.755e0 — rel large only because near-zero elements; per-element allclose dominated by abs_tol)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- value_parity: 63 passed, 0 failed, 9 ignored (ConvNeXt #998 Swin and Inception-V3 #993 still ignored)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision --test probe_deeplabv3_remap: 3/3 active pass + 1 diagnostic-ignored
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision -- fcn_resnet50_value_parity: ok (no regression — both DeepLabV3 and FCN now share resnet50_dilated)
- cargo test -p ferrotorch-vision (full): all bins green (Phase 9 background regression run completed exit 0)
- cargo clippy -p ferrotorch-vision -p ferrotorch-nn --tests --all-targets -- -D warnings: clean
- git diff --stat -- ferrotorch-core/ ferrotorch-gpu/ ferrotorch-nn/: empty

Coordination boundaries 100% respected.

Closing #1006 (DeepLabV3 head naming — covered by remap), #1009 (DeepLabV3 head structural — landed in Phase 9), #1010 (Phase 9 umbrella), #1011 (per-block dilation — closed by 9b continuation).
